metadata.description: Minimal Claude marketplace for exercising fully interchangeable Cowork mise shims

plugins.name: sa-mise
plugins.description: Peer Cowork fixture that bootstraps and shares the latest mise binary through the generated shared shim

plugins.name: sa-mise-session-start-a
plugins.description: Peer Cowork fixture with a SessionStart sample that uses the same generated mise shim as every other peer

plugins.name: sa-mise-session-start-b
plugins.description: Peer Cowork fixture with a SessionStart sample that uses the same generated mise shim as every other peer
